basic_details.job_title: Visva Bharati Research Personnel Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Visva Bharati has published the Research Personnel (JRF / Project Associate-I) Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Research Personnel (JRF / Project Associate I) position on a contractual basis. Candidates holding an M.Sc. in Physics with at least 55% marks (or equivalent CGPA) are eligible to apply via email on or before 27 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: Within two weeks Irom the date of publication of this advertisement. (27 July 2026)

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Physics with at least 55% marks (or equivalent CGPA)
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Physics with at least 55% marks (or equivalent CGPA).

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA (NET/GATE) or Rs. 30,000/- per month + HRA (without NET/GATE)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Visva Bharati Research Personnel (JRF / Project Associate-I) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Visva Bharati Research Personnel Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Visva Bharati Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Visva Bharati Research Personnel Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Visva Bharati Research Personnel Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Sc. in Physics with at least 55% marks (or equivalent CGPA).

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA (NET/GATE) or Rs. 30,000/- per month + HRA (without NET/GATE)

content_sections.heading: Visva Bharati Research Personnel Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.date: Within two weeks Irom the date of publication of this advertisement. (27 July 2026)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Visva Bharati Research Personnel (JRF / Project Associate-I) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Visva Bharati Research Personnel Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Visva Bharati Research Personnel recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Personnel post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Physics with a minimum of 55% marks or an equivalent CGPA to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Personnel (JRF / Project Associate-I) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 37,000 per month, plus HRA, depending on whether they have cleared NET/GATE.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Research Personnel posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Research Personnel (JRF / Project Associate-I) is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Visva Bharati located?
faq.answer: Visva Bharati is located in Santiniketan, West Bengal.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is ANRF/ARG/2025/000535/PS.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations mentioned?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age limits and any applicable relaxations for reserved categories.
